creator: _jkrow
caption:
My coolest room tour yet tbh

If you’re curious about what the rooms look like on a cruise to Antarctica, here’s where we’re sleeping for 22 days as we explore the Falkland Islands, South Georgia and Antarctica on the @lindbladexp National Geographic-Lindblad Explorer 🚢 

Follow for alllll the adventures ❄️ 
#NatGeoLindbladExpeditions #LindbladAmbassador

transcription.text: Here's what our stateroom looks like for a 22-day cruise to Antarctica with National Geographic Lindblad Expeditions. We're in room 216. Walk in and this is our home for the next 22 days. This is what our bathroom looks like. It's actually a really good size. It comes with shampoo, conditioner, and body wash, and all these little toiletries. It's super nice. I'll probably throw up here in a time or two once we cross the Drake Passage. Coming out, this is storage, and this is where our life jackets are going to live. We have storage here, we have hangers, and these are robes. It's going to be really cozy. And they give us laundry bags because they do have laundry on board, and I think we'll do our laundry halfway through. More storage. We have a queen-size bed with a balcony. They also give us reusable water bottles, and these are our custom waterproof carpets. Our luggage is already waiting for us. If you go outside, this is our balcony. And that's our home on the ship. Thanks for watching.
